response.justification: Bogdan has broad engineering experience across languages and domains, including some Java and JVM-related work, but lacks deep, recent, or focused experience in enterprise Java/Kotlin tooling, Spring, or IDE internals — key requirements for this role. His strengths lie in full-stack and polyglot development, not JVM tooling depth.
strengths: Proven experience with Java in past roles (e.g., robotic arms, device orchestration)
Strong open-source contributions and tooling passion (e.g., GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts)
Excellent communication and teaching skills with workshops on web internals and testing
concerns: No recent or prominent experience with Spring, Quarkus, Hibernate, or JVM-based IDE tooling
Primary recent tech stack is TypeScript/Node.js, not Java/Kotlin enterprise ecosystems
Limited evidence of working on IDE internals, build tool integrations, or application server tooling
